description: Dual general-purpose op-amp — single or split supply, rail-to-rail input not required, low power, 1MHz GBW
supply_voltage_range: 3V to 32V single supply, or ±1.5V to ±16V dual supply

pins.name: OUT_A
pins.requirements: LM358 output cannot swing to Vcc+ (not rail-to-rail output). Output saturates ~1.5V below Vcc under load.

pins.name: IN-_A
pins.requirements: High impedance input. Keep traces short to minimize noise pickup.

pins.name: IN+_A
pins.requirements: High impedance input. Input voltage can go down to GND (input common-mode includes GND).

pins.name: GND
pins.description: Negative supply terminal. GND for single supply, V- for split supply.
pins.requirements: 100nF bypass cap between Vcc (pin 8) and GND close to IC

pins.name: OUT_B
pins.requirements: Cannot swing to Vcc+. Saturates ~1.5V below Vcc under load.

pins.name: VCC
pins.description: Positive supply voltage. 3V to 32V single supply.
pins.requirements: 100nF bypass cap to GND close to pin.

required_passives.reason: Supply bypass — prevents oscillation from supply noise

application_circuits.name: Voltage follower (buffer)
application_circuits.description: IN+ = input signal. IN- connected to OUT. OUT follows IN+ with high input impedance, low output impedance.

application_circuits.name: Inverting amplifier
application_circuits.description: Gain = -Rf/Rin. IN+ to voltage divider midpoint (bias). Signal via Rin to IN-. Rf from IN- to OUT.

application_circuits.name: Comparator
application_circuits.description: Reference on IN+. Signal on IN-. OUT goes HIGH when signal < reference. No feedback needed.

common_mistakes: LM358 output cannot swing to Vcc — output saturates ~1.5V below Vcc. Not rail-to-rail.
LM358 input common-mode includes GND but output cannot reach GND under source current — output can only sink current, not source near GND
Phase reversal: if input exceeds common-mode range, output may invert unexpectedly
LM358 is not a high-speed op-amp — GBW = 1MHz, slew rate = 0.6V/µs. Not suitable for audio above a few kHz or fast signals
Unused op-amp sections should have IN+ connected to GND or mid-supply and IN- connected to OUT (follower configuration) to prevent oscillation
No protection against output short to Vcc — only short to GND is allowed continuously
notes: GBW = 1MHz. Slew rate = 0.6V/µs. Input offset voltage ~2mV typical. Common single-supply op-amp for comparator and low-frequency amplifier duties. For rail-to-rail, use LMV358 or TLV2362. For higher speed, use TL072 or NE5532.
